/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o SphereReader.ofx.bundle/Contents/MacOS/SphereReader CMakeFiles/SphereReader.dir/src/SphereReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SphereReader.dir/tmp/openfx/Support/Library/ofxsCore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SphereReader.dir/tmp/openfx/Support/Library/ofxsImageEffect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SphereReader.dir/tmp/openfx/Support/Library/ofxsInteract.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SphereReader.dir/tmp/openfx/Support/Library/ofxsLog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SphereReader.dir/tmp/openfx/Support/Library/ofxsMultiThread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SphereReader.dir/tmp/openfx/Support/Library/ofxsParams.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SphereReader.dir/tmp/openfx/Support/Library/ofxsProperty.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SphereReader.dir/tmp/openfx/Support/Library/ofxsPropertyValidation.cpp.o   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/8.0.1_4/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/ffmpeg/8.0.1_4/lib -lavcodec -lavformat -lswscale -lavutil
